{# Furo renders pages through base.html (it does not support layout.html), so extra document-head markup is added by overriding its empty extrahead block. Per-page Open Graph/Twitter tags and the meta description are generated by the sphinxext.opengraph extension (configured in conf.py), which derives each page's description from its own content instead of repeating one site-wide blurb. This template only adds what that extension does not: the keyword list and the SoftwareApplication structured data. Both describe the software as a whole, so they belong on the landing page alone -- emitting them on every page would make each content page claim to be the application's landing page (misplaced schema.org data that muddies rich results and AI overviews). #} {% extends "!base.html" %} {% block extrahead %} {{ super() }} {% if pagename == "index" %} {% endif %} {% endblock %}
